
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{},"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"a":[{"details":{"forename":"Stefan"}},{"details":{"forename":"Björn"}},{"details":{"forename":"Sergiy"}},{"details":{"forename":"Eelco"}},{"details":{"forename":"David"}}],"b":[{"details":{"forename":"Jens"}},{"details":{"forename":"Alexandra"}}],"c":[{"details":{"forename":"David"}}],"d":[]},"path":[]}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
